home.hero_badge: The First AI Agent Swarm on Unichain
home.hero_desc: Stop losing to static yield. Activate autonomous AI agents that process P2P signal volume through Uniswap v4 Hooks.
home.problem_subtitle: Traditional Uniswap v4 pools lack real-time cognitive adjustments.
home.problem_1_desc: Fees don't react to market volatility, leaving money on the table or scaring away swappers.
home.problem_2_desc: Hooks are unprotected against advanced MEV and toxic flow without real-time AI guardrails.
home.problem_3_desc: Individual LPs can't compete with institutional bots. They need a shared swarm intelligence.
home.feature_1_desc: Agents share neural signals across the swarm, maximizing decision accuracy for the entire pool network.
home.feature_2_desc: Every AI decision is pinned to IPFS before execution. Fully auditable reasoning trail stored via Pinata CID.
home.feature_3_desc: Activate your node for just 100 CELO. Scalable revenue model built for mass-adoption.
home.feature_4_desc: Track real-time swarm intelligence volume. Every signal adds to the cumulative value of the operator network.
home.how_title: From Swarm Signals to On-Chain Action
home.step_1_desc: HookMind agents monitor Unichain mempools and block logs every 12 seconds to compute cluster volatility.
home.step_2_desc: Agents route data to LLM clusters, determining optimal fees based on P2P swarm intelligence.
home.step_3_desc: Before any trade, inference results are pinned to IPFS and cross-verified by neighbor nodes in the mesh.
home.step_4_desc: Agents sign signals with private keys. HookMindCore.sol validates and updates the Uniswap v4 Hook.
home.quote_desc: By focusing on scalable registry and P2P signal volume, HookMind turns Uniswap v4 into a sentient, self-optimizing market. Low entry cost (100 CELO), powerful swarm results. All records pinned on-chain.
home.dev_sdk_desc: Build your own swarm strategies. Direct access to neural scoring APIs and P2P event streams.
home.mcp_tools_desc: Integrate HookMind with Claude or Cursor. Chat directly with your registry node.
home.neural_ui_desc: GPGPU accelerated dashboards monitoring over 50,000 cluster signal particles in real-time.
home.cta_desc: Don't just provide liquidity. Provide intelligence. Activate your first agent registry node for 100 CELO on Unichain.

agents.connect_desc: Your registry console is locked. Connect your wallet and pay the 100 CELO fee to boot your agent.
agents.console_desc: Monitor your AI agent performance and swarm participation. Wallet:

leaderboard.hero_desc: Ranking of top AI agent operators by P2P signal volume and swarm consensus accuracy on Unichain.
leaderboard.stats_update_info: Your metrics update in real-time. Pay your 100 CELO registry fee to start climbing the leaderboard!
leaderboard.climb_info: → Increase your swarm volume to rank up! ⚡
leaderboard.run_daemon_info: Run your agent node to process more swarm signals!

builder.title: Strategy Builder
builder.subtitle: Swarm Logic
builder.export_success: Strategy exported! Drop the JSON into your registry config.
builder.deployed_desc: Swarm Logic successfully committed to the registry.

pools.hero_desc: Uniswap v4 pools managed by the HookMind P2P swarm intelligence.

strategies.hero_desc: Access battle-tested swarm logic built by the top 1% of operators. Pay the activation fee and start processing signal volume immediately.
strategies.toast_extreme_warn: ⚠️ "{name}" is an EXTREME profile. Confirm in wallet.
strategies.toast_deployed: Logic "{name}" activated! Swarm node is live.

descriptions.peg_keeper: Maintains swarm consensus for stable pairs. Minimal overhead, maximum reliability.
descriptions.delta_opt: Uses rolling swarm windows to constantly rebalance the decision curve around volume regimes.
descriptions.vol_shield: Built for high-volality swarms. Detects social spikes and adjusts fees in real-time.
descriptions.mev_extractor: Maximizes signal volume during meme supercycles. High consensus pressure required.

plugins.hero_desc: Extend your registry node with specialized swarm modules. Scalable, P2P-ready, and easy to activate.
plugins.toast_success: Plugin active! Your registry node is now enhanced.

descriptions.pyth: Real-time swarm data feeds for 100+ assets. Used for collective decision making.
descriptions.mempool: Scans the swarm for pending actions. Detects inconsistencies before finalization.
descriptions.chainlink: Cross-swarm synchronization of price and metadata.
descriptions.guardrail: Tracks swarm-wide rejections. Alerts when consensus fails.
descriptions.hedger: Auto-scales registry capacity when swarm volume exceeds threshold.
descriptions.rug: Analyzes swarm exit patterns. Pauses nodes if malicious intent detected.
descriptions.epoch: Optimizes registry revenue collection timing across epoch windows.
descriptions.compound: Rebuilds node reputation by automatically reinvesting signal revenue.
descriptions.circle: Preferred method for paying registry and plugin activation fees in USDC/MXN.
descriptions.telegram: Sends real-time swarm updates to your Telegram bot.
descriptions.discord: Rich swarm event tracking for Discord communities.
descriptions.pnl: Calculates swarm efficiency and node profitability after each cycle.

skills.hero_desc: Specialized neural skills that enhance your node's participation in the global swarm mesh.
skills.banner_info: Skills inject P2P context. Stack multiple skills for massive swarm intelligence.
skills.warning_experimental: Experimental: High swarm desync risk in production
skills.panel_stack_empty: No skills active. Activate your first swarm skill above.

descriptions.vol: Enables the node to compute collective volatility scores for the swarm.
descriptions.il: Calculates real-time risk exposure using P2P swarm data feeds.
descriptions.ipfs: Retrieves the last 5 swarm audits and checks for consensus drift.
descriptions.social: Aggregates social sentiment into collective swarm decisions.
descriptions.mev: Identifies malicious patterns across the entire swarm mesh in real-time.
descriptions.epoch: Optimizes registry revenue collection across 7-day swarm windows.
descriptions.macro: Monitors global market conditions and adjusts swarm risk tolerance.
descriptions.arb: Scans multiple swarms simultaneously for capture-ready discrepancies.

footer.description: The first autonomous AI agent swarm controlling Uniswap v4 Hooks. Scaling P2P intelligence through an accessible 100 CELO registry fee on Unichain.

overview.desc: HookMind is the first Autonomous AI Agent Swarm that controls Uniswap v4 Hooks on Unichain. Every node pays a low-barrier 100 CELO fee to join the registry, contributing to a verifiable, P2P intelligence layer that optimizes the next generation of DeFi.

how_it_works.desc_1: Users pay 100 CELO to register their node and join the P2P signal network.
how_it_works.desc_2: Nodes process block-level data and generate P2P signals pinned to IPFS for swarm verification.
how_it_works.desc_3: Protocol scales via volume-based fees and mass-adopted node registration.

overview.rev_card_1_desc: High-velocity entry fee. Built for mass decentralized adoption.
overview.rev_card_2_desc: Protocol earns from every P2P signal processed by the swarm.
overview.rev_card_3_desc: Premium mesh access for high-frequency institutional swarms.

quickstart.step_3_desc: Unlock your node for 10 MXN (~0.5 USDC) to join the Unichain swarm:

architecture.layer_1_desc: Scalable Node.js engine processing block logs. Computes swarm intelligence scores and routes to LLMs for collective decision making.
architecture.layer_2_desc: Collective signals are pinned to IPFS via Pinata. Returns a CID that serves as immutable proof of swarm consensus.
architecture.layer_3_desc: Decentralized verification of P2P signals. Every action is cryptographically tied to the Agent Registry.
architecture.layer_4_desc: On-chain execution of finalized swarm decisions. Updates Uniswap v4 hooks with optimized market parameters.
architecture.flow_1: Registry Paid: Node joins the global mesh
architecture.flow_2: Signal Generated: Node processes P2P data
architecture.flow_3: Consensus Reached: Signal pinned to IPFS

contracts.core_desc: Hook executor for finalized swarm signals. Applies consensus-driven parameters.
contracts.registry_desc: Primary revenue gateway. Handlers node activation (10 MXN) and swarm identity.
contracts.vault_desc: Registry Revenue Pool handling protocol-wide entry fees.
contracts.insurance_desc: High-volume settlement layer for enterprise swarm agreements.
contracts.fees_desc: Central accounting for 10 MXN fees and signal commissions.
